author: jaffar21
install_msg:
Thanks for installing **Gambling**!

Games available:
• `[p]roulette` — spin the European wheel (animated)
• `[p]slots` — pull the lever (animated)
• `[p]dice [sides]` — roll a die (animated)
• `[p]coinflip` — heads or tails (animated)
• `[p]blackjack` then `[p]hit` / `[p]stand` — classic 21
• `[p]crash` — watch the multiplier fly before it crashes
• `[p]highlow` — guess if the next card is higher or lower

No currency required. Pure fun.
Run `[p]help Gambling` for the full list.
name: Gambling
short: Casino mini-games with animated visuals — roulette, slots, blackjack, and more.
description: A suite of gambling mini-games for Discord with animated GIF visuals generated on the fly. Includes European roulette (spinning wheel + ball), a 3-reel slot machine, dice, coin flip, interactive blackjack, crash, and high-low. No economy or currency required.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any end user data. Active blackjack sessions are kept in memory only for the duration of the game and discarded afterward.
